description: WAR Triumph cycle audited as wave-74 trivium-candidate per prompt. The cycle is canonically five cards (Gideon WAR-15, Jace WAR-55, Liliana WAR-98, Chandra WAR-121, Nissa WAR-170) per MTG Wiki Cycles section — designer-coordinated by Wizards, all Kieran Yanner art, shared X-triumph-came-not-from-Y-but-from-Z flavor template. Corpus carries 2 of the 5: Jace + Nissa. Three Triumph cards needed for a 3-card trivium that maps to three thesis-verbs; we have two. Even if Liliana's Triumph WAR-98 were in inventory the verb-mapping would not cleanly distribute: Nissa-cultivates-life is stewardship-coded, Jace-understanding-self-defeating-power is rebellion-or-stewardship-coded, Liliana-death-sorcery is labor-coded — three-verb mapping is plausible at five cards but the corpus only has the white-and-rebellion-and-stewardship halves not the labor-half. SKIP-WITH-RECEIPTS. The DBS Babidi-Spaceship gatekeepers candidate (Yakon/Pui-Pui/Dabura) does not surface a clean designer-coordinated 3-card-cycle in corpus either. The BFZ Allies cohort is too broad (15+ Ally-keyword commons) to constitute a 3-card trivium. The Theros Triumvirate (Heliod/Erebos/Thassa as sibling-gods) does not have 3 corpus cards depicting each god individually. No clean candidate meets the wave-73 trivium-bar.
citations: [MTG Wiki: War of the Spark — Cycles section, five-Triumph-cycle Kieran-Yanner-designer-coordinated]
[Scryfall flavor_text: WAR Triumph cycle templated X-triumph-came-not-from-Y-but-from-Z construction]
[Corpus inventory: 2 of 5 WAR Triumph cycle members present (Jace-Triumph WAR-55, Nissa-Triumph WAR-170)]
[[_triple-thesis]] — refusal-with-receipts as first-class output; trivium-bar requires all three verbs distributed across three corpus members]
deferred_to_future_wave: If Liliana's Triumph WAR-98 lands in inventory (canonical labor-coded death-sorcery; flavor template fits) AND Chandra's Triumph WAR-121 (red, opposition-coded) OR Gideon's Triumph WAR-15 (white, virtue-coded) accumulates, the cycle becomes a viable trivium candidate. Reserve for the wave that completes the corpus's WAR cycle accumulation. Alternative path: the WAR Defeats cycle (HOU 2017) is the canonical bookend pair; if any of HOU-38 / HOU-71 / HOU-98 / HOU-122 / HOU-123 land in inventory, the WAR-Triumphs + HOU-Defeats cross-set duality opens a different trivium-candidate axis.
notes: Refusal-with-receipts is the curator-behavior per [[bbl-museum-curation-framing]] and [[_triple-thesis]]'s discipline. Wave-73 BFZ trivium (Kozilek's Sentinel + Reckless Cohort + Serene Steward) remains the corpus's only completed designer-coordinated 3-card trivium hitting all three thesis-verbs. The corpus's second trivium will arrive when a clean 3-card designer-coordinated cycle accumulates the verbs. The triangle holds; we don't fabricate to fill the shape.
